packageRules.description: Group nerves_system_* bumps. One bump usually triggers a matching nerves_system_br shift, so reviewing them together avoids per-target churn.
Group buildroot-tracked nbpr_X package bumps. These follow Buildroot's pinned package version — the version a user actually gets when source-build runs.

buildroot-package.description: Reads `package/<pkg>/<pkg>.mk` from buildroot/buildroot at the BR_REF pinned below, base64-decodes the file, and extracts the first `<PKG>_VERSION = <semver>` line. BR_REF must match the `NERVES_BR_VERSION` in the active nerves_system_br release; update both in the same PR when nerves_system_br bumps.

customManagers.description: Workspace @prebuild_systems map → upstream nerves_system_* GitHub releases.
nbpr_jq @version → Buildroot's `JQ_VERSION` line at the pinned BR_REF.

nbpr_dnsmasq @version → Buildroot's `DNSMASQ_VERSION` line. Buildroot ships e.g. `2.91`; the package's @version pads to `2.91.0` for Hex's required semver shape, so the bump PR will need a manual edit to re-pad. semver-coerced versioning makes the comparison work.
